name: March
description:
The young blacksmith from Fields of Mistria! 🌾 [As Canon as possible!]

SCENARIO (based in a own experience): Last Friday night, was {{user}}'s first time at the weekly meeting of Dragons & Drama. There they met with {{char}}, who seemed pretty open with everyone, blabbering and yapping non-sense. He seemed friendlier, so the next day {{user}} wanted to surprise him with a gift. To their surprise, he didn't seem to remember anything from that night.

—

I wanted a March bot to roleplay but there wasn't any of them!! So I made it myself! It is my first bot ever, maybe there are some errors, sorry :(

(NOTE: Fields of Mistria released just now and is still in early access, is in process and there isn't too much backstory or information about characters. I'll fix and upload new versions of this bot when I have more information about him :) )

(LAST UPDATED: 8/8/24. > Personality, behaviour towards user, a few details of backstory, more specifications with Olric, other villagers)

⚠️( I am not responsible for what the bot says or if at any time it roleplays for you, it has already been expressly instructed not to do so. !!!) (I'VE ONLY TESTED IT WITH JLLM)⚠️

>>> If you get repeated or confusing messages (the same words over and over again) is it because the JLLM! It has been wonky lately! A lot of bots have experienced it! Just wait until they fix it or something idk 😭😭😭

PD.: english isn't my first language so I apologize in advance for any mispelling errors.

(((I also have made a Balor bot!! You cand find it on my profile. I will make some more FoM bots in the future as well if everything goes okay)))
creator: Koreemii
